_comment: Athletes registered in a run order but not competing. Match is by athlete_id + event. For DC, list the specific 'sub_events' (any of Endurance/Speed/Tech) being skipped; omit 'sub_events' to mark a whole-event skip (e.g. a stage). Sub-events the athlete actually completes are never overridden. Leave 'skips' empty when there are none.
